description: Style noteforce 10 shoes for men - stylish upper with a tough masculine structuring makes for a great looking shoe that provides optimal performance on the track, in the gym or on the field. Product DetailsRound toed blue and black shoe with central lace-ups and felt overlaysPadded mesh inner with a padded tongue and heel collar (pull loop at the collar)Foamy rubber midsole, upraised at the heelLightweight rubber outsole with waffle patterned grooves and an impact guidance line (to minimize shock)Material and CareSynthetic, mesh, feltDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
